# =============================================
# robots.txt — LEX BUSINESS HUB
# https://lexbusinesshub.ro
# =============================================

User-agent: *
Allow: /
Disallow: /api/
Disallow: /*.json$

# Sitemap
Sitemap: https://lexbusinesshub.ro/sitemap.xml

# Block AI scrapers (optional — remove if you want AI visibility)
User-agent: GPTBot
Disallow: /

User-agent: ChatGPT-User
Disallow: /

User-agent: CCBot
Disallow: /

User-agent: anthropic-ai
Disallow: /

User-agent: Google-Extended
Allow: /

# Allow all major search engines
User-agent: Googlebot
Allow: /

User-agent: Bingbot
Allow: /

User-agent: Yandex
Allow: /

User-agent: DuckDuckBot
Allow: /
